articles.title: Two constituencies with same name led to my loss by a single vote, ex-Minister Periakaruppan claims before HC
articles.description: Ex-Minister K.R. Periakaruppan claims a postal vote error due to duplicate constituency names cost him the election by one vote.

articles.title: CITU Kollam district committee warns of massive protests over ousting of contract workers
articles.description: CITU Kollam threatens protests against the ousting of contract workers, calling actions inhumane and politically motivated.

articles.title: Meet the 9 TVK leaders sworn in alongside Joseph Vijay: From Sengottaiyan to Keerthana
articles.description: ​Joseph Vijay began his tenure as Tamil Nadu chief minister with a nine-member TVK cabinet featuring veteran leaders, first-time faces, professionals, and close aides.

articles.title: Congress panels adopt resolution recommending B.J. Vijay Kumar’s nomination to Legislative Council
articles.description: Congress committees endorse B.J. Vijay Kumar's nomination to the Legislative Council, recognizing his dedicated service over 25 years.

articles.title: Pak minister calls himself ‘ordinary worker’ of Asim Munir, draws ire on social media
articles.description: Pakistan politics: Minister Ali Pervaiz Malik called himself an ordinary worker of Field Marshal Asim Munir, triggering criticism over the military's influence in civilian governance. Social media users accused the ruling PML-N of undermining democracy.

articles.title: Women protest outside Petbasheerabad police station seeking arrest of Bandi Sanjay’s son in POCSO case
articles.description: Women protest in Hyderabad demanding the arrest of Bandi Sanjay’s son in a serious POCSO case involving a minor.

articles.title: Satheesan-Venugopal Face-Off Delays Congress Decision On Kerala Chief Minister
articles.description: The Congress leadership is facing mounting pressure over the selection of Kerala’s next Chief Minister despite the UDF’s landslide victory. Rahul Gandhi and Mallikarjun Kharge held key meetings with contenders V. D. Satheesan, K. C. Venugopal and Ramesh Chennithala. While many MLAs reportedly back Venugopal, public sentiment and alliance partners appear to favour Satheesan. The party is now trying to build consensus while avoiding factional fallout. Watch

articles.title: Udhayanidhi Stalin is the Leader of Opposition
articles.description: Udhayanidhi Stalin elected Leader of the DMK Legislature Party, set to oppose Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay in the Assembly.

articles.title: 3.82 cr devotees take dips at Sangam on Mauni Amavasya; Akhilesh says probe seer's 'mistreatment'
articles.description: Over 3.82 crore devotees performed holy dips at the Sangam and Ganga on Mauni Amavasya during the Magh Mela in Prayagraj. The event saw a brief disruption when police stopped Shankaracharya Swami Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati from proceeding to the Sangam, sparking a political debate over the alleged mistreatment of seers.

articles.title: In Kerala, nearly half of Congress’ MLA-elects are young faces
articles.description: Nearly half of Congress' elected MLAs in Kerala are young leaders, reflecting successful youth engagement in recent elections.

articles.title: ‘A parasitic party’: PM Modi targets Congress over DMK fallout, says it is latching onto Vijay’s TVK in Tamil Nadu
articles.description: At a rally in Bengaluru, PM Modi used the recent BJP electoral wins to contrast "pro-incumbency" with the Congress’s history of losing states, and attacked the party's "power-hungry" politics in Tamil Nadu.

articles.title: From Thalapathy To Tamil Nadu CM: 5 Things To Know About Vijay
articles.description: Tamil star and political figure Vijay, married to Sangeeta Sornalingam since 1999 with two children, faces divorce after she alleged his extramarital affair

articles.title: India, Africa Enter A New Strategic Phase With Focus On Innovation, Trade And Growth
articles.description: India and Africa are preparing for 4th India-Africa Forum Summit in New Delhi from May 28-31, 2026. The meeting aims to speed up cooperation in digital technology, trade, health, agriculture, space, and skills. The partnership focuses on shared development goals, innovation, climate action, and stronger people-to-people ties for inclusive growth.

articles.title: Satheesan, Venugopal, Chennithala: Congress’ Musical Chairs In Kerala Has Just One Chair
articles.description: AICC in-charge for Kerala Deepa Dasmunshi has said the Congress high command will decide "very soon" on who the party's chief minister would be.

articles.title: Historic chapter begins in Tamil Nadu as Vijay's cabinet takes oath
articles.description: After TVK's historic win, Vijay took oath as Tamil Nadu's new CM. Minister KG Arunraj called it a 'historic chapter', outlining priorities like clean governance, women's safety, and a drug-free state, starting with a white paper on finances.

articles.title: Stalin congratulates CM Vijay, cautions him on 'empty treasury' claims
articles.description: Former CM MK Stalin congratulated new Tamil Nadu CM Vijay but warned him against blaming the previous government for the state's financial condition, urging him to fulfil his electoral promises instead of making 'empty treasury' claims.

articles.title: Himanta Biswa Sarma elected NDA leader, AGP calls it 'good fortune'
articles.description: Asom Gana Parishad (AGP) president Atul Bora called it 'good fortune' that Himanta Biswa Sarma was elected leader of the BJP and NDA Legislature Party in Assam. Sarma said the new NDA government will take oath on May 12 with PM Modi present.

articles.title: AAP minister slams Centre's 'Operation Lotus' after ED arrests leader
articles.description: AAP minister Harbhajan Singh ETO slammed the Centre after the ED arrested his colleague Sanjeev Arora, alleging central agencies are being misused for 'Operation Lotus'. Arora was arrested in a money laundering case and remanded to ED custody.

articles.title: P Senthilkumar, G Laxmi Priya appointed secretaries to new TN CM Vijay
articles.description: The Tamil Nadu Government has appointed P Senthilkumar as Additional Chief Secretary/Secretary-I and G Laxmi Priya as Secretary-II to the newly elected Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay, with their posts declared equivalent to senior cadre positions.

articles.title: TVK govt to publish white papers, promises transparent governance: Minister
articles.description: TVK minister R Nirmalkumar promises transparent governance with white papers for all departments after actor Vijay took oath as Tamil Nadu CM. Vijay vowed to address state debt and usher in an era of secularism and social justice.

articles.title: "Vile": Chief Justice Slams Casteist Remark Attributed To Him On Social Media
articles.description: The CJI's statement said that the social media account has falsely attributed the statement

articles.title: South Korea welcomes rare baby bump as population shrinks
articles.description: SEOUL: Kim Su-jin and her husband have set aside their doubts and embraced parenthood, joining a small but notable wave of South Korean couples having children despite the country's steep demographic decline.South Korea has one of the world's lowest birth rates, and the government has spent billions of dollar

articles.title: Hantavirus Alert: India’s Union Health Ministry activates precautionary surveillance; what travellers need to know
articles.description: India's Health Ministry has activated surveillance following hantavirus cases on the MV Hondius cruise ship, with eight probable infections and three deaths reported. While the WHO assesses the global risk as low, two asymptomatic Indian nationals are onboard. Travelers to South America are advised to take precautions against rodent exposure.

articles.title: Allahabad High Court Criticises UP Police Over Security Of Citizens
articles.description: The court made the observations while pulling up Badaun SSP Ankita Sharma

articles.title: ‘No foreign aggression in Kamjong attack’: Manipur Home Minister G Konthoujam
articles.description: A delegation of ruling party legislators led by Manipur Home Minister Govindas Konthoujam visited the three affected villages to assess the situation.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu: Stalin Persuaded Allies To Support TVK Govt, Says DMK
articles.description: Tamil Nadu: Stalin Persuaded Allies To Support TVK Govt, Says DMK

articles.title: Bihar Governor’s ‘5-hour teaching’ rule sparks faculty revolt, DU teachers back protest
articles.description: The Federation of University Teachers' Associations of Bihar argues that the order violates the UGC's 2018 norms. DUTA has joined the protest, seeking intervention from Governor Syed Ata Hasnain.

articles.title: Voting underway for municipal elections
Preparations Underway In Guwahati For BJP Legislature Party Meeting Ahead Of Assam CM Oath Ceremony
articles.description: Preparations Underway In Guwahati For BJP Legislature Party Meeting Ahead Of Assam CM Oath Ceremony

articles.title: Who is S Keerthana? Meet Vijay’s 29-year-old minister and TVK’s youngest face
articles.description: S Keerthana, a 29-year-old first-time MLA from Sivakasi, is set to become one of Tamil Nadu’s youngest ministers in Vijay-led TVK government. Here’s her story.

articles.title: ‘Missiles, drones locked on US targets’: Iran warns of ‘heavy assault’ after tanker strikes in Gulf of Oman
articles.description: Iran's IRGC has warned of a "heavy assault" on US military assets and ships if Iranian oil tankers or commercial vessels are attacked in the Strait of Hormuz. This follows US forces disabling two Iranian oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman and an earlier exchange of fire near the strait.

articles.title: Vijay sworn in as Tamil Nadu CM: What did TVK promise ahead of Assembly polls
articles.description: Tamil actor Vijay's party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam, has taken charge as Tamil Nadu's new government. Vijay is now the Chief Minister. The party secured a significant victory in the state assembly elections. Their manifesto promised extensive welfare schemes for women, job opportunities for youth, and reforms in governance. This marks a major shift in Tamil Nadu's political landscape.

articles.title: ‘We’ll fight this battle': Mamata Banerjee urges Opposition to form ‘joint platform’ against BJP
articles.description: Mamata Banerjee had earlier refused to resign from the CM’s post even after BJP swept the assembly polls winning 207 out of 294 seats.

articles.title: No one will be arrested without being told the reason, UP govt assures HC
articles.description: The government also stated that all arrests would be made under the provisions of the Bharatiya Nagrik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS).

articles.title: Teacher who shared Urdu poem as WhatsApp status booked. Madhya Pradesh HC comes to his rescue
articles.description: Court quashes FIR, calls poem ‘a satirical and thought-provoking commentary on the issue of human rights violations against women’

articles.title: Morning Digest: Vijay to be sworn in as T.N. Chief Minister today; Putin says Ukraine war is ‘heading to an end’, and more
articles.description: The Hindu Morning Digest gives a select list of stories to start the day. Read the top news today on May 10, 2026

articles.title: Quote of the day by Epicurus: “Vain is the word of a philosopher which does not heal any suffering of man. For just as there is no profit in...” Founder of Epicureanism reveals a timeless warning about mental suffering, anxiety, emotional pain, happiness, and the true purpose of wisdom in modern life: Why the famous Garden School thinker believed philosophy is useless unless it heals the human mind
articles.description: Quote of the day by Epicurus: The Epicurus quote of the day is gaining fresh attention as mental health, philosophy, emotional healing, and self-improvement searches continue rising globally. His timeless words say philosophy has no value if it cannot heal human suffering. The Epicurus quote of the day connects deeply with modern stress, anxiety, burnout, and emotional confusion. People today seek wisdom, inner peace, mindfulness, and meaningful living more than empty success. Epicurus believed true happiness comes from calm thinking, freedom from fear, and simple living. His philosophy still influences modern psychology, mental wellness, Stoicism, and personal growth conversations.

articles.title: Outreach programme: Cong to hold 3-day yatras across state next week
articles.description: Baghel said the yatras would focus on reaching the maximum number of people in each constituency, understanding their issues and expectations and mobilising support at the grassroots level. He added that there were suggestions for the leader of opposition to attend the concluding programmes of the yatras

articles.title: Misri’s proposed Kathmandu visit deferred for now; India invites Nepal for big cat summit
articles.description: New Delhi is hosting the IBCA summit on June 1, and leaders of all member states, including Nepal, have been invited. It is likely that Nepalese Foreign Minister Shishir Khanal would make a visit to India although there has been no confirmation yet.

articles.title: Lakhimpur Kheri violence case: Former DM to appear before trial court on May 13 via video conferencing
articles.description: We are trying our best to present witnesses in court, most not present at their original address, says prosecution

articles.title: Subrata Gupta, EC's Special Observer for SIR, Appointed Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari's Advisor
articles.description: Subrata Gupta, a retired IAS officer, has been appointed as an advisor to West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari, as announced in a recent notification.

articles.title: Nancy Guthrie Case: Sheriff Nanos gives ‘really great’ update as he shares Mother’s Day message for Guthrie family amid mystery; watch here
articles.description: The search for Nancy Guthrie, mother of Savannah Guthrie, nears 100 days. Pima County Sheriff Chris Nanos confirmed investigators are making progress in the suspected abduction case. Nancy Guthrie vanished from her home in January 2026. The FBI and local police are involved. A hair sample was sent for analysis.

articles.title: “He wants everyone to forget”: Mike Vrabel allegedly hopes affair rumors with Dianna Russini fade away amid mounting controversy
articles.description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and his alleged affair partner, former NFL insider and reporter of the New York Times Dianna Russini, have tried to bury their affair rumors in the last few days, sparking outrage among millions. But it has only gotten worse as more and more details of their alleged inappropriate relationship have been released.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Friedrich Nietzsche: 'It is not a lack of love, but a lack of friendship that makes unhappy marriages.' Life lessons on family, relationships, success by German classical scholar and philosopher
articles.description: Quote of the day by Friedrich Nietzsche highlights how friendship shapes marriage and relationships. The quote explains that unhappy marriages come from lack of friendship rather than lack of love. The article explains the quote meaning, biography of Friedrich Nietzsche, his philosophy, life lessons on relationships, family, success, and the modern relevance of the quote of the day today in society and human life.

articles.title: B S Yediyurappa carved own path by struggle: Amit Shah
articles.description: BJP News Amit Shah: Home Minister hails B.S. Yediyurappa's 50-year political journey and BJP's historic West Bengal victory during BSY Abhimanotsava in Chitradurga.

articles.title: Immigration judges issue more than 80,000 voluntary departure orders since Trump took office
articles.description: Immigration judges have issued more than 80,000 voluntary departure orders since President Trump returned to the White House, a figure that represents a more than sevenfold increase over the roughly 11,400 such orders issued during the final 15 months of the Biden administration, according to court data compiled by ...

articles.title: Echoes from the Tokyo Trial
articles.description: International Law News: Exploring the legacy of Justice Radhabinod Pal's dissent at the Tokyo Trial and its relevance in a post-Trump world of global law.

articles.title: No pvt details in answer books: AKTU
articles.description: AKTU warns students not to write phone numbers, addresses or special identification marks inside answer books; violations will be treated as unfair means and penalized.

articles.title: DMK seeks separate Parliament seats from Congress, Rijiju confirms
articles.description: Union Minister Kiren Rijiju has confirmed that the DMK's request for separate seating in Parliament will be accommodated. The move follows the DMK-Congress alliance split in Tamil Nadu after Congress supported actor Vijay's TVK to form government.

articles.title: Vijay and the regrets of Rajinikanth
articles.description: Tamil Nadu Elections 2026: Analysis of TVK Chief Vijay's victory and why superstar Rajinikanth missed the political bus despite a massive fan following.
